purpose: Repair phase-04 home presentation coverage rows with precise media and state aggregation evidence.

set.sourceBehavior: `HomeScreen.kt` composes bundled ad, category, favourite, and restaurant-card imagery into the discovery feed without any gallery picker, EXIF processing, or zoom interaction.
set.targetBehavior: `renderHomeRoute` preserves the same bundled-media feed composition by routing home sections through `buildHomeAdCards`, `buildRecommendedCategories`, `buildFavouriteStrip`, and `buildRestaurantList`, each rendering packaged app media only.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `HomeScreen.kt` itself only composes image-backed sections and does not implement gallery, EXIF, or zoom behavior.

Manual target review confirmed `renderHomeRoute` preserves the same packaged-media home sections through `buildHomeAdCards`, `buildRecommendedCategories`, `buildFavouriteStrip`, and `buildRestaurantList`.

Focused target test PASS on 2026-06-28: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` from `entry/src/test/cangjie` passed `phase04_home_history_discovery_test.cj::homeStoreLoadsFixtureBackedSections`, confirming the home feed still loads the repository-backed sections that own the bundled media surfaces.
set.notes: The source feature label over-detects viewer/EXIF/zoom semantics here; the real phase-04 home behavior is packaged feed imagery rendered inside home sections.

testEvidence.detail: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` passed `phase04_home_history_discovery_test.cj::homeStoreLoadsFixtureBackedSections`, covering the repository-backed home sections that surface the packaged images.

manualEvidence.detail: The translated home route preserves static packaged imagery for ads, categories, favourites, and restaurant cards without widening the phase into media-library or image-viewer behavior.

set.targetBehavior: `HomeStore.loadHomeState()`, `buildVisibleState(...)`, and `buildFilteredState(...)` own the translated home-state aggregation and derived visible state, preserving the source view-model responsibility for repository-backed ads, categories, restaurants, and liked restaurants.
verificationEvidence: Manual source and target review confirmed the home state owner still aggregates the same repository-backed lists and derives visible home results from current query and filter state.

Focused target test PASS on 2026-06-28: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` from `entry/src/test/cangjie` passed `homeStoreLoadsFixtureBackedSections`, `homeStoreFiltersFavouritesAndRestaurantsFromSearchQuery`, `homeStoreSearchMatchesCaseInsensitiveSourceUiExpectation`, and `homeStoreAppliesChipFilterToVisibleRestaurantLists`, confirming the translated home-store aggregation plus visible-state recomputation semantics.

testEvidence.detail: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` passed the phase-04 home store aggregation, search, and chip-filter tests on 2026-06-28.

manualEvidence.detail: Home store aggregation still mirrors the source `HomeViewModel` responsibilities, while `buildVisibleState(...)` and `buildFilteredState(...)` make the derived visible feed update immediately from query and chip state.
